subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses with truth, that they may be a guidance and remembrance unto all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق لتکون هدایة و ذکری للعالمین
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
